rounds.plan_think: To determine if there is a citation or reference relationship between the current query "LLaMA Beyond English: An Empirical Study on Language Capability Transfer" and the document "LlamaTurk: Adapting Open-Source Generative Large Language Models for Low-Resource Language," I should first look at the references section (DOC1_A9) to see if the query is listed as a reference. info.summary: The references section lists academic papers and studies cited throughout the document, providing a comprehensive bibliography of related work and foundational research.
info.text:
